title: cyclophorus subvelutinus
intro: Cyclophorus subvelutinus is a species of land snail-eating snail, also known as a carnivorous snail, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Cyclophorus subvelutinus are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Cyclophorus subvelutinus can be prepared in herbal form as a decoction or powder for medicinal use.
